summary: Migrated all 187 Lean files in Cslib/Logics/ to use the module keyword. Removed private from all def/abbrev/theorem/lemma declarations (except LinearLogic private lemma which uses attribute-based discovery). Applied module + public import + @[expose] public section transformation to 155 files. Fixed 1 name collision. Full lake build passes with 2913 jobs.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary with verification results and plan deviations
